textByHash.93837f77048a6540b5b80b24745bf0d5a844caf0: They came and demanded tribute, and even though I told them to go away, they came back at night and stole my farming tools!
textByHash.82f09141e82d1f62359285a53167d2416c4b6d98: Without my trowel and fork, I can't do anything to keep the weeds from the farming patch.
textByHash.95fc58b35663bb3f74f56abefb188630a50fdc1b: Please, find my tools again, so I can get back to work.
textByHash.aefa8bb8c90946c218176e8f7ed072852b0749af: Thank you for finding my tools for me. Did you find everyone's belongings?
textByHash.478e927f3b156497a577187b35dc54c9d1e2203f: You're more than welcome to it, for getting our belongings back.
